item.title: 3 potholes have appeared on the edge of the pavement/road, 10th April
item.description:
Outside 21 Sydenham Villas Road Cheltenham GL52 6EG, where the dropped pavement meets the Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 19b, Sydenham Villas Road, Fairview, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Accident waiting, 10th April
item.description:
Why do we pay tax? Shoddy repair on potholes coming loose already. Paint eroded away as potholes get bigger
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hayden Road, Hesters Way, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple pot holes, 10th April
item.description:
Swerving cars to try and miss potholes- an accident waiting to happen The council knows about these and have done nothing. Negligence at its finest
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hayden Road, Hesters Way, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
